## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Nebius AI Studio and explore GrowthX.ai's AI-driven content creation workflows and infrastructure needs.](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai operates a sophisticated AI-powered content creation service with human expertise in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Their platform uses various AI models and custom workflows, processing 1-2M activities monthly](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Nebius aims to provide value in the AI infrastructure layer, particularly for companies building AI-centric SaaS products](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai is interested in model fine-tuning and more efficient AI pipelines as they scale, aligning with Nebius's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

## Topics

### Nebius Overview and Product Offerings

  - [Two main layers: Nebius Cloud (AI infrastructure) and Nebius AI Studio (high-level AI services)](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Cloud: Physical infrastructure with AI-centric compute, storage, networking, and managed services](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [AI Studio: Pre-hosted models, fine-tuning capabilities, and developer tools (competing with Fireworks, Together AI)](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Target customers: AI researchers (Cloud) and AI SaaS companies (AI Studio)](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### GrowthX.ai Platform and Workflow

  - [Three-layer approach: expert layer, AI workflows, and infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Content-as-a-service model with expert human review and intervention](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [AI coding agent builds workflows as code, with a runtime layer for execution](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Custom workflows for each client, pulling from various "artifacts" (company info, context)](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Using multiple AI models (e.g., Claude, Perplexity) for different tasks within workflows](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Processing 1-2M workflow runs/activities per month](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)

### Technical Infrastructure and Challenges

  - [Using Render for hosting, Temporal for runtime, and Langchain for traceability](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Built custom failovers and fallbacks for quick model swapping and testing](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [Interested in fine-tuning models to leverage accumulated data and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Currently not compute cost-sensitive due to high-value outputs for clients ($10-60k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Mostly batch processing, with some real-time features (e.g., AI editor in Canva-like experience)](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)

### Future Directions and Potential Collaborations

  - [Exploring parallel processing of multiple workflow versions with a "judge" system](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Interest in Nebius's research on agentic systems and efficient use of open-source models](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Potential for collaboration as GrowthX.ai moves towards optimizing and scaling their platform](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX.ai to further investigate Nebius AI Studio offerings
  - [Maintain contact for potential future collaboration, especially as GrowthX.ai scales and optimizes their platform](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Explore possibilities for Nebius to support GrowthX.ai's transition to a more open-source based ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/5LobP54Nzsq2TNu_37Myua_6RhUsofLu?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
